scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:app:mac: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:backend:binaries:mac && cargo tauri build --bundles app && node scripts/resign-macos-app.mjs --target native
scripts.build:app:mac:arm64: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:backend:binaries:mac && cargo tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles app && node scripts/resign-macos-app.mjs --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:app:mac:x64: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:backend:binaries:mac && cargo tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin --bundles app && node scripts/resign-macos-app.mjs --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:app:win: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:backend:binaries:win && cargo tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:app:linux:flatpak:prep: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:backend:binaries:linux
scripts.build:app:linux:flatpak: npm run build:app:linux:flatpak:prep && mkdir -p artifacts && flatpak-builder --user --force-clean --repo=flatpak-repo flatpak-build flatpak/com.lingofix.desktop.json && flatpak build-bundle flatpak-repo artifacts/Lingofix-Desktop-linux-x64.flatpak com.lingofix.desktop
scripts.publish:win: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/win-x64
scripts.publish:osx-arm64: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/osx-arm64
scripts.publish:osx-x64: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r osx-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/osx-x64
scripts.publish:linux-x64: npm run build:web && dotnet publish backend/Lingofix.Backend.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:SelfContained=true -o out/linux-x64
